## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs / config
- [ ] Firmware-only
- [ ] Server / dashboard

## Verification

How did you test this? Mention hardware used, server logs, browser checks, etc.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles (`npm start` for server, `arduino-cli compile` for firmware)
- [ ] No secrets / WiFi creds added to tracked files
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or API changed
